title: Kiosk escape check
instruction: While Calee is in the foreground, swipe down from the top edge of the screen, then press the recents/home hardware button if the device has one.
expectedResult: No notification shade, quick-settings panel, or recents view opens. The screen stays on Calee.

title: Calendar colour legibility
instruction: Open the Calendar tab in Month view and look at each calendar's colour dot/highlight.
expectedResult: Every calendar's colour is visually distinct from the others and readable against the background.

title: Long event title layout
instruction: Open or create an event with a very long title and view it in Day, Week, and Month views.
expectedResult: The long title truncates or wraps cleanly -- it does not overflow, overlap other text, or break the layout.

title: Touch responsiveness
instruction: Tap through Today, Calendar, Tasks, Chores, and Settings tabs at a normal pace.
expectedResult: Every tap registers promptly with no noticeable lag, double-tap requirement, or missed taps.

title: Weather rendering (if configured)
expectedResult: Either real weather data renders correctly, or (if weather isn't configured for this account) no broken/placeholder/error state is shown instead.
